component.name: rlshim
component.summary: A lightweight, native Linux launcher for RuneLite

description.p: rlshim is a lightweight, native shim for launching RuneLite on Linux with Jagex Accounts. It seeks to be as non-intrusive as possible, while handling credential management securely via your system keyring and handling RuneLite installation for you.

ul.li: Native launcher — no Chromium Embedded Framework dependency
Secure credential storage via libsecret (gnome-keyring, KWallet, etc.)
Minimal footprint — under 32 MB including assets

description.p: Improve runelite handling, add java dependency, unit tests
Add prompts for keyring unlock and critical errors.
Version bump only to mitigate GitHub tag nuisance.
Add placeholders for empty character names in character selection menu.
